## Source: ghsa-malware (072b6d2231177af20f508aa0f80ac0f7bd7847a0dc8abc0716610cf6feaab11a)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ed2a0f9c584ecfcffc1c76619a1637559d1d8771f78e1d3655f819f7fff67962)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bvr-api' @ 0.3.12 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
